CustomField.formula: CASE(TEXT(leaseworks__Transaction_Type__c) ,'MR Accrued', IF(leaseworks__Utilization_Status__c=='Approved By Lessor', leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent_Utilization__r.leaseworks__Total_Maintenance_Reserve__c, null) ,'MR Claim Accrued', IF(leaseworks__Claim_Status__c=='Approved', leaseworks__Claim_Amount__c, null) ,leaseworks__Amount_Invoiced__c)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-calculated field, showing accrued amount as per the source Document. This amount affects Running Balance (Accrued). NULL for transactions updating only cash balance.
CustomField.label: Amount (Accrued)
